summary: Tested all Answer Evaluation & UX Improvement features. 10/10 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified via Playwright.

issues: 'Frequently tested' action hint never triggered for this test pack since no concept has exam_weight='high' or >=1.5. Logic is correct but test pack doesn't exercise this path. Not a bug.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 1403 lines — should be split into router modules
extract_claims_and_match_requirements() likely makes LLM call for each evaluation — no caching. Could be slow under load but functional.

Upload risk_summary panel only shows if result.risk_summary?.length > 0 — correct conditional rendering but risk_summary depends on LLM job output. Could not test upload flow end-to-end (would require actual file upload).
seed_data_creation: New sessions created during testing on pack 69a0d422aaf6f2ddaeebd0f1

Session page: new labels (Didn't know/Partially knew/Knew it/Instant recall), evaluation panel with covered/missing ideas, risk message after rating, core answer panel prominent, explanation collapsible. Pack detail: risk icon+label (High/Medium/Low risk), action hints (Often confused/Common exam mistake/Frequently tested). Upload risk_summary panel not tested end-to-end (needs file upload). Test pack: 69a0d422aaf6f2ddaeebd0f1 (new, with requirements), 69a0c27812e8a54c83092edb (old, no requirements).
